text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Sweep Tosho and Zenno Rob Roy are
both on fire!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
They're both running in the autumn Tenno Sho,
right?! Who do you think's gonna win?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho, end of story! She just won the
Takarazuka Kinen! Strength is strength, and she's
got it in spades!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! There's no way Rob Roy's losing! She's
just not the kinda runner who'd let a loss or two
throw her off!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text:
This is our hero we're talking about! She's gonna
slay that witch and take back the number one
spot!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
...
"Take it back," huh?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... One more set!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...Rob Roy, can I talk to you for a second?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh?! Of course. How can I help?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: What made you decide to take this on?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Take what on, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. It's just, I was reading about you... and I
just had to know.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
You seem completely different than how you
were before your classic year.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I don't mean to be rude or anything, but you were
so introverted and, well, you seemed kinda weak.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Even when you were doing interviews, you
seemed sort of jittery.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Especially after the Derby, during the press
conference and stuff. You looked like you were
sad you couldn't live up to people's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
You looked like you didn't want anyone to talk to
you...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Haha... Um... So it was that obvious, huh...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
But then, all of a sudden, you weren't afraid
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
You were amazing in your senior year, and were
even named Umamusume of the Year... And then
you suddenly started opening up about your
goals.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Even now, you're getting ready to take on a new
challenge. I can tell from your face how
determined you are.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: So... what happened?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Where did you get the courage? ...Aren't you
scared?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...I am scared.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Even now, my voice trembles when I talk about
my goals. But you know...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sweep cast her magic on me.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...! Sweep did?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's just as you said. All I did was disappoint
people in my classic year.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Even talking about my dream of being a hero
seemed absurd. I felt so pathetic. It was
embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But then one day... I caught sight of this selfish,
reckless, blinding light.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And when I saw that shining star... I couldn't help
but hope to shine that way myself.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Once that spark was lit, there was no putting it
out. My heart had already caught fire.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You've seen it before too, so I think you know the
feeling. Her magic is so amazing it's almost
frightening.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The closer I get to that light, the more I want it
for myself. It's unfair... and frustrating...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Whatever notions of quitting I harbored inside,
her magic burned them all away.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...It's not just you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I felt frustrated too, watching her run. I felt that
way at the Oka Sho. And at the Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how frustrating it is, some things
are just plain impossible!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
...I mean, I saw her myself. I saw her on TV,
running in the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I felt like I couldn't even stand on the same
ground as her—like there was an invisible wall
between us.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: So why...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Why do I still feel so frustrated? Why...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Enough with that crap! Don't whine about what's
normal or the way things are. Just smash it all up
with magic!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Why do I want her to smash it all up?
